rows.name: Ask Nimu about Bias folklore.

rows.label: tev041301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev041301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Nimu if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev041301_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Nimu if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev041301_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Nimu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev041301_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Nimu about Bias folklore.

rows.label: tev041301_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Nimu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev041301_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Nimu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0001
rows.name:
In time of chaos, Cataclysm Bird
will appear in sky. Lead multitude
to land of beginnings and ends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Tree Clan has told this
legend for 10,000 suns.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0003
rows.name:
This legend seems to have come
true. It foretold our coming here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0004
rows.name:
But then what is beginning?
And what is end?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Maybe Mira has destiny
in store for us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0006
rows.name:
But many bad things may still
happen. We must remain watchful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0101
rows.name:
One of our female Bias
likes you Earth aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0102
rows.name:
Some lament this choice. I do not. We
should look on your kind with favor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0103
rows.name: Times change. So must we.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0104
rows.name:
Hmm? Where is female Bias now? I think
she was seen in industrial district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0201
rows.name:
I heard about BLADE operative who
seeks to learn about Cavern Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0202
rows.name:
This BLADE is said to be
mighty. What is BLADE planning
with brutes of Cavern Clan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0203
rows.name:
Cavern Clan is nothing like aliens
on ship. You should stay away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0301
rows.name: You allowed Cavern Clan inside city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0304
rows.name:
...It is your city. You can do as
you will. But we are not pleased.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG0305
rows.name:
Cavern Clan may be what
triggers great cataclysm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG1001
rows.name:
Great cataclysm has been averted.
We no longer fear old legend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG1002
rows.name:
I will find new legend now.
It will be my calling![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG1003
rows.name:
I will follow epic saga of Earth aliens
and all who make homes on this ship![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG1008
rows.name:
We must not let others
suffer Oche's fate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG1009
rows.name:
I will sing of this sad war to young
Bias. I will make certain they remember.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG1010
rows.name:
Maybe Tree Clan and Cavern Clan
will join one day. Maybe they forget
their anger. I hope it is so.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG2001
rows.name:
We have new bond with Slovity Pagus.
We could ask for no greater victory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG2002
rows.name:
Now we try to join Tree Clan
and Cavern Clan. We must seize
chance to reunite Bias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev041301_MSG2003
rows.name:
Thank you, Earth alien. You inspire
us. You give all races fair chance.[ST:wait ]
